application-profile.description: Create an application profile by reusing existing vocabularies and other application profiles.
application-profile.title: Application Profile

data-schema.description: Directly create a set of technical schemas and documentation to describe your data in JSON, XML or CSV formats.
data-schema.title: Data Schema

profile.auto-profile-description: Automatically create default profile of all concepts from profiled specifications including all structures, if any.
profile.help: Enter the URL of DSV specifications to be profiled.

schema.sgov-description: Uses SGOV as a source ontology and local semantic model to store applied changes.

vocabulary.description: Create new RDFS/OWL vocabulary, potentially reusing existing vocabularies.
vocabulary.title: Vocabulary
